narrative: | Each country is assigned a unique identifier to ensure precise differentiation and reference for its national football team and related data. (Hash: 8ce5265b6c2d46b8) | | This system allows for accurate tracking of each team's progress and achievements over time. | | Such meticulous organization highlights the prominence of football in Europe. | | Belgium is well-known for its competitive national team in European football.
